pi_items.source: Task description instructs creating a new document with this exact name.
Task description instructs setting the document prefix to 'NFR'.
In setup_task.sh, a section with 'heading': 'Security' is injected into SRS.json.
In setup_task.sh, the injected Security section has three children with text containing 'AES-256', 'TLS 1.3', and 'Argon2'.
The setup_task.sh script modifies SRS.json, indicating 'SRS' is the document ID.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically injected data. The 'Security' section is dynamically added to SRS.json during setup, containing three child requirements with signatures 'AES-256', 'TLS 1.3', and 'Argon2'. The target new document is specified in the task description as 'Non-Functional Requirements' with prefix 'NFR'.
